3147610.name: Ojol The Game
3147610.description:
Ojol The Game invites you to experience how it is to be a taxibike driver in your daily life in finding and carrying out orders to earn money. In this game you are required to find as many orders as possible to become the best taxibike driver. You can upgrade your motorbike and also your cellphone to be faster. While waiting for your order you can walk around the map as you wish. However, when there is an order, try to complete it immediately in order to get a high rating. To get a high rating, the key is that you have to be fast in completing orders and don't crash.

Features:

- Taxibike Driver Simulation
The main feature of this game is a simulation as an online taxibike driver, you are required to find as many orders as possible and get a high rating from customers, make sure to make customers comfortable by not crashing or violating traffic. With the money you get you can buy other items that will make your game easier and more exciting.

- Vehicle Selection and Customization
There are many motorbikes that you can use in this game, you can set the color as you like. But you have to buy it first, to be able to buy these items you can do it by doing many orders as possible or you can also run as many daily quests as possible. You can refresh the quest with some money/coins.

- Character Selection and Customization
You can choose a male or female character also equipped with a selection of hairstyles, outfits and accessories.

- City Exploration
In addition to looking for orders, you can also walk around the city, visit beautiful places for you to relax and enjoy the scenery and atmosphere.

- Daily Quests
Run daily quests, it will gives you various rewards that will speed up your progress, to buy the items you want and also open locked features as you levels up.
3147610.supported_languages: 英语, 印度尼西亚语
